title: Review-Packet Builder Manifest Schema v0

sources.label: Review-Packet Builder Input Manifest Spec v0
Multiple Myeloma Tooling Readiness Gate v0
BCMA Claim Set Expert Review Packet v0
Multiple Myeloma Roadmap Public Task Queue v0

limitations: Does not provide eligibility guidance, expanded-access guidance, monitoring guidance, or publication authorization for any person.
Does not claim that multiple myeloma has been cured.
Does not build a review-packet builder, generator, dashboard, explorer, ranking tool, trial finder, patient matcher, recommendation system, or generated-claim pipeline.
Schema validation checks manifest shape only, not expert review, evidence strength, clinical importance, patient relevance, actionability, or publication readiness.
Implementation remains limited to the copied-reference route-table dry-run script selected by the aggregate implementation gate; packet assembly and generated claims remain blocked.
